note: E-commerce demand = online orders fulfilled from the company's warehouses or its stores (YoY). After a record Q2 FY25, demand turned negative for three straight quarters and fell sharply in Q1 FY26 (−26.1%); management cited softer consumer traffic. Q4 FY25 ≈ −5.5%.

audience.note: SimilarWeb estimate for buildabear.com. The online storefront skews adult and female and is led by non-paid traffic — evidence that e-commerce is the adult channel, even as order volume has softened.
